title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Unacademy Global Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Unacademy Global Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Curriculum Developer looking for your next big career move? Unacademy Global Group in Thane offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Unacademy Global Group:
Unacademy Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Unacademy Global Group!
